response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar
ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR order_date : date
REL Order -> Client : 0..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar
ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar
ENTITY WorkCenter
PK work_center_id
ATTR work_center_id : integer : PK
ENTITY ProductionStep
PK production_step_id
ATTR production_step_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR work_center_id : integer : FK
ATTR step_number : integer
ATTR scheduled_time : datetime
ATTR quantity : float
REL ProductionStep -> Order : 0..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL ProductionStep -> Material : 0..N -> 1 : FK=material_id
REL ProductionStep -> Operation : 0..N -> 1 : FK=operation_id
REL ProductionStep -> WorkCenter : 0..N -> 0..N : FK=work_center_id
